data.title: demo: D1 — hello world SQLite database
data.description:
## Goal

Educational hello-world demo for Cloudflare D1 (SQLite).

## What to implement

* Worker that creates a `greetings` table on startup
* `POST /greet` inserts a row
* `GET /greet` returns all rows
* `wrangler.jsonc` with D1 binding

## Verify

```sh
curl -X POST https://<worker>.workers.dev/greet -d '{"msg":"hello world"}'
curl https://<worker>.workers.dev/greet
```

## Repo

`skogai/cloudflare` — folder: `demos/d1-hello`
